name: White Clay Creek SP - Chambers Rock Rd lot
notes: State park entrance fee Mar 1 - Nov 30; most heavily stocked water in Delaware.

name: White Clay Creek SP - Creek Road corridor
notes: Walk-in stream access along Creek Rd north of Newark; fee booth in season.

name: Brandywine Creek SP main entrance (Wilson Run)
notes: Off Adams Dam Rd; plenty of parking for the stocked trout stretch; park entrance fee in season.

name: Tidbury Pond shoreline (Tidbury Recreation Park)
notes: Kent County park pond; bank fishing only, no boats; spring trout pond.

name: Newton Pond ramp and pier
notes: Car-top boat ramp and ADA T-pier; only DNREC small pond with trout.
